CT._hardening_note: COMPLETE (brackets): single & mfj verified (CT DRS CT-1040 TCS Table B). mfs==single CONFIRMED (single/MFS share schedule & exempt thresholds, CT DRS). hoh own schedule captured (16k/80k/160k/320k/400k/800k, between single & mfj). KNOWN APPROXIMATION (documented, not bracket): CT recapture/phase-out Tables C (2%25 add-back) & D (benefit recapture) modeled approximately — these add 25-6300 for higher earners, can push effective rate above stated. IRA deduction 75%25 TY2025 -> 100%25 TY2026. SS exempt 75k single/MFS/HoH, 100k MFJ. Pension exempt same thresholds.

MD._hardening_note: COMPLETE: single==mfs, mfj==hoh==QSS (MD Comptroller 2025 tax alert primary; BRFA/HB352 added 6.25%25/6.50%25 top brackets TY2025). single/MFS top: 5.75%25>250k, 6.25%25>500k, 6.5%25>1M. mfj/HoH top: 5.75%25>300k, 6.25%25>600k, 6.5%25>1.2M. MD IRA-TRAP: taxes pension/401k/IRA but pension exclusion up to $41,200/taxpayer age65+; SS NOT taxed; 2%25 capgains surtax FAGI>$350k. Std ded S/MFS 3350, MFJ/HoH 6700.

OK._hardening_note: IN PROGRESS — MAJOR CORRECTION NEEDED. Staged OK is WRONG: has 4-bkt 0/2.5/3.5/4.5%25 @ 10099/11249/13549. ACTUAL OK TY2025 = 6 brackets 0.25/0.75/1.75/2.75/3.75/4.75%25. Single (exact, Valur): 0.25%25<=1000, 0.75%25<=2500, 1.75%25<=3750, 2.75%25<=4900, 3.75%25<=7200, 4.75%25 above. MFS = MFJ/2 (incometaxpro primary). MFJ ~doubled (0.75 at 2000, top 4.75 at 12200) — needs exact 511 table. HoH own schedule — needs 511 table. YEAR DECISION NEEDED: HB2764 (signed 2025) restructures OK to 3 brackets top 4.5%25 for TY2026 (filed 2027) — but TY2026 thresholds may not be published yet. Family standard is 2026; may need to use TY2025 6-bkt as best-available or confirm 2026 3-bkt published. TODO: pull OK Form 511 instructions tax table for exact MFJ/HoH; resolve 2025-vs-2026 structure. SS exempt. Std ded S/MFS 6350, MFJ 12700, HoH 9350.

NY._approximation: NY tax-benefit recapture provision not modeled: bracket-sum understates by ~5% (~$280 at $100k taxable) for incomes above ~$107,650 where NY claws back the lower-bracket benefit. For relocation comparison at typical retiree incomes this is immaterial to rankings, but flag for precise-mode. Validated: single $100k computes $5,432 vs published $5,714.
NY._hardening_note: single+mfj VERIFIED (NY Tax Law 601, 9-bkt 4-10.9%25 TY2025). mfs==single (NY convention). HoH DISTINCT schedule — NOT captured (seeded=single, pending NY IT-201 HoH rate schedule). RECAPTURE (documented approx like CT): NY AGI>$107,650 supplemental tax claws back lower-bracket benefit, ~5%25 low high earners, known-hard. NY pension exclusion $20k/$40k MFJ age59.5+; SS NOT taxed; 2026 rate cut coming (bottom brackets to 3.9%25).

NH._note: I&D tax repealed eff Jan 1 2025 (TY2026 fully zero on retirement income). High property tax (1.61%) is NH primary revenue — the relevant Tier-2 cost for a NH retiree.

IL._note: Flat 4.95% on wages/cap-gains but ALL qualified retirement income (pension, IRA, 401k, conversions) is exempt -> a retiree drawing from SS+pension+IRA pays $0 IL income tax. Among the income-tax-but-retirement-exempt club (cf PA, MS). High property tax (2.08%) is the real IL cost.

NE._hardening_note: RATES CONFIRMED (2.46/3.51/4.55%25, top 4.55%25 TY2026 LB754, ->3.99%25 2027; single==mfs, mfj doubled, hoh own schedule structure). THRESHOLDS IN DISPUTE across sources — must get NE DOR 2026 published rate schedule (Form 1040N / Circular EN) to settle: staged 2399/17999/18000; Tax Foundation 2026 shows 4130/24760 (inflation-adjusted); VisaVerge claims 2026 thresholds FIXED not adjusted; Kiplinger ~2999 single / 29000 top. Statute 77-2715.03(3) DOES mandate annual inflation adjustment, so TF inflation-adjusted likely correct — but CONFIRM from DOR primary before encoding. HoH/MFS structure (own/==single) still also pending exact thresholds. NOT DONE — was prematurely marked complete; downgraded pending DOR 2026 schedule.
